title: lepidium schlechteri
intro: Lepidium schlechteri, also known as Schlechter's cress, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, commonly found in tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Lepidium schlechteri include its potential to help with weight loss, lower blood pressure, and reduce the risk of certain diseases such as cancer and diabetes. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which are often consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
